/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/gcc  -D_LANGUAGE_C  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG  -static CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/errors.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/file_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/lang_defs.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/string_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/options.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/option_seen.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/get_options.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/opt_actions.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/file_names.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/objects.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/phases.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/run.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/special_options.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/targets.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/license.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/check_combos.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/implicits.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/version_hg.c.o CMakeFiles/pathcc_rpm_hash_style.dir/targ_info_rpm_hash_style.c.o  -o ../../bin/pathcc_rpm_hash_style -rdynamic
